dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3382 IS: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 520 South Walnut Street in Bloomington, Indiana, as the “Curt Cignetti Post Office”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Banks introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs

form.official-title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 520 South Walnut Street in Bloomington, Indiana, as the Curt Cignetti Post Office.

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 520 South Walnut Street in Bloomington, Indiana, shall be known and designated as the Curt Cignetti Post Office.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the Curt Cignetti Post Office.
